caption.full:
Maggie Grace joins AMC's NASCAR drama Thunder Road as CEO

Maggie Grace is joining the series regular cast of AMC's upcoming NASCAR drama, Thunder Road. She will play Laney Whitlock, the CEO of the fictional Whitlock Racing team, described as carrying herself 'like she owns oxygen.' Grace previously worked with AMC on Fear The Walking Dead.

What are your first thoughts on Maggie Grace joining Thunder Road as the powerhouse CEO Laney Whitlock?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #ThunderRoad #MaggieGrace #NASCAR
caption.firstComment: Maggie Grace bringing that fierce CEO energy to Laney Whitlock sounds electric — what character traits are you hoping she brings to the racing world?

youtube.title: Maggie Grace Joins NASCAR Drama 'Thunder Road' as CEO
youtube.description:
Maggie Grace is a new series regular on AMC's NASCAR drama Thunder Road, playing CEO Laney Whitlock of the fictional Whitlock Racing team. Grace previously starred in AMC's Fear The Walking Dead and looks forward to working with showrunner Taylor Elmore again. The series is produced in association with NASCAR.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
